notes: Unique Bulgaria-source prospects with any tracked engagement (webinar/open day reg; brochure download; chat; lead form submit). Include both campuses. Dedupe by primary email/phone. Exclude anonymous traffic.
Unique new Bulgaria-source leads created in CRM in period with usable contact info. Include both campuses. Dedupe by primary email/phone. Exclude duplicates and test records.
Unique Bulgaria-source applicants with application status submitted (or later) in period. Dedupe by applicant_id/email. Exclude started/incomplete applications.
Unique Bulgaria-source applicants issued an offer in period. Count max 1 offer per applicant per intake (use latest decision). Exclude withdrawn before issuance.
Unique Bulgaria-source offerholders who paid required deposit in period. Count max 1 per applicant per intake. Exclude failed payments and refunds processed within same period.
Unique Bulgaria-source students enrolled for an intake in period (registration confirmed per admissions/registry). Exclude deferrals to later intakes and cancellations before census.
Lead capture rate into leads stage: leads_count / awareness_count for the same period. Use % in 0-100. Exclude anonymous awareness activity.
Lead-to-application conversion into applications stage: applications_count / leads_count for the same period. Prefer cohort-by-intake when available. Use % in 0-100.
Application-to-offer conversion into offers stage: offers_count / applications_count for the same period. Prefer cohort-by-intake when available. Use % in 0-100.
Offer-to-deposit conversion into deposits stage: deposits_count / offers_count for the same period. Use % in 0-100. Exclude refunds processed within same period.
Deposit-to-enrollment conversion into enrollments stage: enrollments_count / deposits_count for the same period. Use % in 0-100. Exclude deferrals and pre-census cancellations.
Cost per lead (CPL): paid_recruitment_spend_eur / leads_count for period. Include paid media + event fees allocated to Bulgaria. Exclude staff costs and agency commissions.
Cost per application (CPA): paid_recruitment_spend_eur / applications_count for period. Same spend definition as CPL unless split tracked. Exclude staff costs and agency commissions.
Cost per deposit (CPD): paid_recruitment_spend_eur / deposits_count for period. Same spend definition as CPL unless split tracked. Exclude staff costs and agency commissions.
Cost per enrollment (CPE): paid_recruitment_spend_eur / enrollments_count for period. Same spend definition as CPL unless split tracked. Exclude staff costs and agency commissions.
Offer-to-enrollment yield: enrollments_count / offers_count for the same intake when possible (otherwise same period). Use % in 0-100. Exclude deferrals and pre-census cancellations.
